title: Strolid: Your Dealership's AI Co-Pilot
summary: Strolid offers an AI co-pilot solution for car dealerships, blending human expertise with AI trained on specific dealership data to enhance sales and service operations, improve customer engagement, and provide deep insights. It aims to solve the problems of traditional BDCs by offering instant responses, personalized follow-up, and unified conversation intelligence.

AI Built from Your Domain Data
Unlike generic AI, Strolid's AI is trained on your specific dealership data, 
learning from actual conversations. This delivers more accurate responses 
and better lead qualification, automatically identifying complaints, price 
shoppers, OTD requests, and trade objections to help your team close more 
deals.
Automotive-specific AI training for sales & service
Learns unique dealership patterns
Continuously improves with conversations
WWW.STROLID.COM Call: 855-787-6543 email: sales@str olid.com
Meet Sophia: AI Where It Helps
Sophia Outbound Lead Recovery
Automatically calls unengaged leads and intelligently 
hands off to a human anytime the customer asks or the 
situation requires it. Forgotten leads become real 
appointments without overwhelming your team.
Natural conversation flow
Seamless human handoff
Recovers cold leads automatically
Sophia Inbound Service Scheduler
Answers service calls instantly, books appointments 
through your existing tools, and escalates to a live person 
when needed. No more missed calls, no more appointment 
delays.
24/7 availability
Direct system integration
Smart escalation protocols
AI can answer questions. Humans make the promise. Strolid gives you both 4 in one co-pilot.
WWW.STROLID.COM Call: 855-787-6543 email: sales@str olid.com
